falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is falsified if any of the following hold on the OECD quarterly panel 1995-2021: (a) the cumulative ZLB multiplier on real GDP at h=8 quarters is below 1.0, (b) the normal-regime multiplier at h=8 is above 1.0, OR (c) the gap (ZLB minus normal) is below 0.5 at p<0.10 in the state-dependent LP-IV. Robustness requirements: gap result must hold under both narrative and forecast-error fiscal-shock identification; failure under both refutes; failure under one but not the other is INFORMATIVE-mixed.
